creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191839
py-openapi-codec.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file for the Python package py-openapi-codec, a Core API codec for the Open API schema format (also known as "Swagger").

Note:
The package depends on py-coreapi (see PR #226943: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226943)

QA:
~~~

- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64) for py27 + py36 flavors -> OK
- portlint -> OK

--
Cheers
Kai
